title: KHR_mesh_primitive_visibility_hint glTF Mesh Primitive Extension
description: Marks a mesh primitive as visible only in a particular view context, such as first-person or third-person. Applies to this primitive only (no inheritance). Advisory: the runtime resolves the active view context and skips rendering the primitive when the context does not match. Use when a view-context-specific region is baked into a mesh that cannot be separated by node.

role.description: The view context in which this primitive is visible. Standard vocabulary values ('always', 'first_person', 'third_person') provide interoperability guarantees; custom, vendor-prefixed values are permitted for domain-specific view contexts.

label.description: Human-readable label for this visibility annotation. Used for UI display in authoring tools and inspectors.
